turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Horizon Mutual injury intake, this is Leo. Do you need emergency assistance?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: I cut my hand badly at a construction site about 20 minutes ago. There's still bleeding through the bandage.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: If bleeding is uncontrolled, please call emergency services immediately. Are you alone right now?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: My foreman is here and driving me to the emergency room now.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Good. I'll capture only critical details now and complete intake after you're safe. Name and employer?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: A utility knife slipped while I was cutting insulation on site.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Understood. I'm flagging this as an urgent workplace injury and opening claim WC-701433 for immediate treatment.

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: Do I need pre-authorization before the ER?

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: No, seek emergency treatment now. Have the hospital reference claim WC-701433 and your employer contact us for full intake.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Take care. We'll follow up once you're stable.
